MySubmarine.Mail_Text: Dear @^^hello. I have been wanting to test my skills for some time, so I have been working on a large production... I was working on a submarine production.^And I finally finished it! I won't use it myself though.^I'll give it to @ because I think you can make good use of it!^I'll put it on the pier on the other side of the fish store tomorrow.^^-Maru
config.EnableThisMod.name: Enable this mod
config.EnableThisMod.description: On/Off setting of this mod itself.
config.SubmarineAction.name: Submarine Action
config.SubmarineAction.description: You can set the action when you click on the submarine. To switch between different types of cutscenes, the settings should be changed on the title screen.
config.MC_NoConditions.name: No Conditions
config.MC_NoConditions.description: Enabling this setting allows you to use submarines from the start of the game. However, since it enables travel to Ginger Island regardless of the game's normal progression, unexpected flags may appear or disappear in relation to game progression. Please exercise caution when enabling this feature.
